raw_text:
<think>
The user requests: "packet_id=HVSMW2-760723E2677A5697FBBA status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-ABCF1A52 blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it Return the three-line status record."

We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. In that order. Starting with route_verdict=. No extra lines, headings, JSON, markdown, etc.

Thus we output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-ABCF1A52
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Probably we need to include the packet_id? The user says "Return the three-line status record." The three fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we ignore packet_id. Only output these three lines.

Thus answer.

Check any edge cases: Ensure proper formatting: each line "key=value". No extra spaces at start or end? The user expects exactly that.

Thus final.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-ABCF1A52
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
